mean_cn: v.呈现，展现；  adj.现在的，当下的；出席的/ˈprezənt/
mean_en: something that you give to someone especially as a way of showing affection or thanks
sentence: The picture presents different ways that signals can travel to our devices.
sentence_trans: 这幅图展示了信号传输到我们设备的各种方式。
word_etyma: pres前 + ent名词后缀 → present礼物，赠送物
